applications.name: reporting-skills plugin
applications.description: Single plugin-source repository with Claude and Codex manifests, canonical skills under skills/.

skills.description: Canonical skill directories: create-one-pager, debating-it-out, one-pager-prd, package-for-review.

validation_scripts.description: Manifest validation and shared plugin version-bump checks for Claude/Codex plugin metadata.

tests.description: Unit tests for repository validation scripts.

key_directories.skills/: All skill content owned by this plugin repo
